recommendations.title: The Extra Man
recommendations.overview: A man who escorts wealthy widows in New York's Upper East Side takes a young aspiring playwright under his wing.

recommendations.title: The Nanny Diaries
recommendations.overview: A college graduate goes to work as a nanny for a rich New York family. Ensconced in their home, she has to juggle their dysfunction, a new romance, and the spoiled brat in her charge.

recommendations.title: Girl Most Likely
recommendations.overview: A failed New York playwright stages a suicide in an attempt to win back her ex, only to wind up in the custody of her gambling-addict mother.

recommendations.title: Things Heard & Seen
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that both her husband and their new home harbor sinister secrets after they leave Manhattan for small-town life.

recommendations.title: 10,000 Saints
recommendations.overview: A sweeping multigenerational story set against the backdrop of the raw, roaring New York City of the late 1980s; adoption, teen pregnancy, drugs, hardcore punk rock, the unbridled optimism and reckless stupidity of the young—and old—are all major ele

recommendations.title: Kick-Ass
recommendations.overview: Dave Lizewski is an unnoticed high school student and comic book fan who one day decides to become a super-hero, even though he has no powers, training or meaningful reason to do so.

recommendations.title: Harvey
recommendations.overview: The story of Elwood P. Dowd who makes friends with a spirit taking the form of a human-sized rabbit named Harvey that only he sees (and a few privileged others on occasion also.) After his sister tries to commit him to a mental institution, a comedy

recommendations.title: Capote
recommendations.overview: A biopic of writer Truman Capote and his assignment for The New Yorker to write the non-fiction book "In Cold Blood".

recommendations.title: Milk
recommendations.overview: The true story of Harvey Milk, the first openly gay man ever elected to public office. In San Francisco in the late 1970s, Harvey Milk becomes an activist for gay rights and inspires others to join him in his fight for equal rights that should be ava

recommendations.title: mother!
recommendations.overview: A couple's relationship is tested when uninvited guests arrive at their home, disrupting their tranquil existence.
